name: mcp_word
description: MCP server for Microsoft Word document automation.
long_description: MCP Word Office provides tools to create, edit, format, secure, inspect, and export Word documents. It includes document creation and merge workflows, content editing, styles and formatting, headers/footers, links, metadata, protection features, footnotes/endnotes, and PDF conversion.

tools.name: create_document
tools.description: Create a new Word document with optional metadata.

tools.name: copy_document
tools.description: Create a copy of an existing Word document.

tools.name: get_document_info
tools.description: Get document metadata and properties.

tools.name: get_document_text
tools.description: Extract all text from a Word document.

tools.name: get_document_outline
tools.description: Get outline information such as headings and tables.

tools.name: list_available_documents
tools.description: List available .docx documents with pagination support.

tools.name: merge_documents
tools.description: Merge multiple Word documents into one file.

tools.name: add_heading
tools.description: Add a heading to a document.

tools.name: add_paragraph
tools.description: Add a paragraph to a document.

tools.name: add_picture
tools.description: Insert an image into a document.

tools.name: add_table
tools.description: Add a table to a document.

tools.name: add_page_break
tools.description: Insert a page break in a document.

tools.name: delete_paragraph
tools.description: Delete a paragraph from a document by index.

tools.name: search_and_replace
tools.description: Search for text and replace matches in a document.

tools.name: add_table_of_contents
tools.description: Generate and insert a table of contents.

tools.name: format_text
tools.description: Apply text formatting to selected content.

tools.name: create_custom_style
tools.description: Create a custom reusable style.

tools.name: format_table
tools.description: Format table appearance including borders and shading.

tools.name: protect_document
tools.description: Protect a document with a password.

tools.name: unprotect_document
tools.description: Remove password protection from a document.

tools.name: add_restricted_editing
tools.description: Enable restricted editing for document sections.

tools.name: add_digital_signature
tools.description: Add a digital signature marker to a document.

tools.name: verify_document
tools.description: Verify document protection and signature status.

tools.name: add_footnote_to_document
tools.description: Add a footnote to a document.

tools.name: add_endnote_to_document
tools.description: Add an endnote to a document.

tools.name: convert_footnotes_to_endnotes_in_document
tools.description: Convert footnotes to endnotes in a document.

tools.name: customize_footnote_style
tools.description: Customize footnote numbering and visual style.

tools.name: get_paragraph_text_from_document
tools.description: Extract text from a specific paragraph index.

tools.name: find_text_in_document
tools.description: Find text occurrences in a document.

tools.name: convert_to_pdf
tools.description: Convert a Word document to PDF format.

tools.name: add_header
tools.description: Add or update a document header.

tools.name: add_footer
tools.description: Add or update a document footer.

tools.name: add_hyperlink
tools.description: Insert a hyperlink into a document.

tools.name: add_bookmark
tools.description: Insert a bookmark anchor in a document.

tools.name: get_core_properties
tools.description: Read core document properties such as title and author.

tools.name: set_core_properties
tools.description: Update core document metadata properties.

tools.name: set_page_layout
tools.description: Set page orientation and layout options.

directory.title: Allowed directories
directory.description: Select directories where this server can read and write Word files.
